task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Create a trapezoidal sketch for the Rail
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch of a trapezoid (wider at the top than the bottom) is visible in the 3D view, or a 'Sketch' object is seen inside a body (e.g., 'Rail') in the Tree View.
A 3D trapezoidal prism (the Rail) is visible in the workspace, or a 'Pad' operation is visible in the Tree View for the Rail body.

task_completion.description: Create a sketch for the Carriage with a dovetail slot
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sketch of a rectangle with a trapezoidal cutout is visible in the 3D view, or a corresponding 'Sketch' object is seen inside a second body (e.g., 'Carriage') in the Tree View.
A 3D rectangular block with a dovetail slot (the Carriage) is visible in the workspace, or a 'Pad' operation is visible in the Tree View for the Carriage body.

task_completion.description: Save the document as 'dovetail_slide.FCStd' in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'dovetail_slide' or a save dialog confirms the file is being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/dovetail_slide.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical interface to construct the models.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and the Tree View to create sketches and pads.

integrity.description: The FreeCAD Tree View shows a logical progression of parametric modeling.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View displays at least two Bodies, each containing Sketches and Pads, indicating the model was built step-by-step rather than imported as a single static mesh or step file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by downloading or generating the file via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run a script that instantly generates the 'dovetail_slide.FCStd' file or downloads it from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating two separate bodies in FreeCAD: a 'Rail' and a 'Carriage'. The Rail is a trapezoidal prism (100mm length, 10mm height, 30mm bottom width, 40mm top width; volume ~35,000 mm³). The Carriage is a 60x20mm rectangular block with a dovetail slot (50mm length, 10.5mm height, 31mm bottom width, 41mm top width; volume ~41,100 mm³). The final file must be saved as 'dovetail_slide.FCStd' in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/. The Tree View in FreeCAD should show at least two distinct bodies.
